7:["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"uv add mnemosyne","language":"bash"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Verify Installation"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"","language":"bash"}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"First Memory Operation"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Initialize memory\nmem = Memory()\n\n# Store a memory\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"The user prefers dark mode and uses Vim keybindings.\",\n  tags=[\"preferences\", \"ui\"]\n)\n\n# Recall relevant memories\nresults = mem.recall(\"What are the user's interface preferences?\")\nfor r in results:\n  print(r.content)\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"What's Next?"}]
